title: Command Center discovery webhook (POST body)
description: Sent by the dashboard when the user clicks Run discovery. schemaVersion 1.

sourcePreset.description: Canonical source selection preset. When omitted the worker resolves a deterministic fallback from stored config and legacy enabledSources.

googleAccessToken.description: Optional. Google OAuth access token sent by the dashboard for this run only. When present, the worker uses it to call Google Sheets and skips its own service-account/OAuth-token configuration. Stripped from any persisted run record.

companyAllowlist.description: Optional. When present and non-empty, restricts discovery to the listed company names/domains/keys. Empty/missing means no company restriction. Strings are trimmed by the worker; entries cap at 50.

companyBlocklist.description: Optional. When present and non-empty, suppresses listed companies from discovery results. Empty/missing means no blocklist. Strings are trimmed by the worker; entries cap at 50.
